title: AI Workflow Automation
subtitle: Design and deploy end-to-end AI workflows that run your processes on autopilot

modules.title: Workflow Thinking with AI
lessons: What makes a good AI workflow vs. a bad one
The five stages of any effective workflow
Mapping a workflow from trigger to outcome
Choosing between automation and AI augmentation
Real-world workflow examples: content, sales, support
modules.mini_task: Map a 5-step workflow for a task you do every week

modules.title: AI Inputs and Triggers
lessons: Webhook triggers and what they are
Scheduling workflows to run at specific times
Using form submissions to start AI workflows
Email and Slack triggers for AI processing
Manual vs. automatic workflow triggers
modules.mini_task: Create a workflow that is triggered by a form submission in Make or n8n

modules.title: AI Processing Steps
lessons: Sending data to an AI model as part of a workflow
Chaining multiple AI calls in sequence
Conditional logic: if/else branches in workflows
Transforming AI output before the next step
Error handling and retry logic
modules.mini_task: Add an AI step to your workflow that processes text and returns a result

modules.title: Outputs and Actions
lessons: Sending AI results to a Google Sheet or Airtable
Posting AI-generated content to social media
Sending personalised emails from AI output
Creating documents or PDFs from workflow results
Notifying a team via Slack or email
modules.mini_task: Connect your workflow output to a Google Sheet and verify the data appears

modules.title: Production Workflows
lessons: Testing a workflow end-to-end before going live
Monitoring and logging workflow runs
Handling rate limits and AI API quotas
Versioning and documenting your workflows
Sharing workflows with your team
modules.mini_task: Run your complete workflow 3 times with different inputs and verify all outputs

final_project: Design, build, and deploy a multi-step AI workflow that automatically processes real data and delivers a useful output to a destination of your choice.
